mapper.sql: select m.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.material_type, m.category_id, c.category_name, m.spec, m.model, m.unit, m.drawing_no, m.material_version, m.source_type, m.lot_control_flag, m.sn_control_flag, m.inspection_flag, m.safe_stock, m.default_bom_id, m.default_route_id, m.status, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from material m left join material_category c on c.category_id = m.category_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from material where category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: insert into material( material_code, material_name, material_type, category_id, spec, model, unit, drawing_no, material_version, source_type, lot_control_flag, sn_control_flag, inspection_flag, safe_stock, default_bom_id, default_route_id, status, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{materialType}, #{categoryId}, #{spec}, #{model}, #{unit}, #{drawingNo}, #{materialVersion}, #{sourceType}, #{lotControlFlag}, #{snControlFlag}, #{inspectionFlag}, #{safeStock}, #{defaultBomId}, #{defaultRouteId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from material where material_id in
#{materialId}
